current.summary: Executed all 18 implementation tasks for content-based classification (phases 1-9). 6 commits, +2,248 lines. Found and fixed 2 detector bugs via integration tests. Only TUI confirm-bucket rendering remains — ready for brainstorm.

activeWork.description: TUI confirm-bucket rendering with confidence tier labels — needs brainstorm before implementation
activeWork.progress: All 18 implementation beads from the plan are closed. 6 commits landed on main. New files: detector_content_signal.go, sanitize.go, vocabulary.go, scanconfig.go, confidence.go, integration_test.go. Modified: analyzer.go (pipeline wiring), generate_manifest.go (--scan-as, --strict, --no-config, --debug-skips, interactive fallback, confidence tier CLI output), audit.go (signal trace events), types.go (SkipEntry, DebugSkips, NoConfig, Signals, ScanAsPaths), detector_cc.go (path traversal fix), match.go (README exclusion), detector_toplevel.go (quick-win patterns). One remaining bead: syllago-6fubw (TUI confirm-bucket rendering). User chose 'full brainstorm first' for this — session ended before brainstorm started.

git.lastCommit: 70a2fce fix: content-signal detector bugs found by integration tests

recentDecisions: SignalEntry exported (not private signalEntry) — stored on DetectedItem.Signals for audit logging
Interactive fallback uses existing bufio.Scanner numbered-list pattern from registry_create_native.go
syllago ignore (xjyng) deferred — needs its own design pass, not part of this feature
Task 7.2 split: CLI tier output done (ddxn2), TUI rendering is new bead (6fubw) since TUI has no confirm-bucket view
Audit wiring belongs in CLI command (not analyzer) — analyzer exposes Signals on DetectedItem, command emits audit events
Pre-filter bug fixed: include filename in keyword check (mcp-servers.json was missed)
Confidence boost bug fixed: apply user-directed +0.20 before floor check (0.40 base was dropped)
nextSteps: Run /brainstorm for TUI confirm-bucket rendering (syllago-6fubw) — user chose full brainstorm
Key question: where does confirm bucket surface? Install wizard review step? Library metadata panel? Both?
Pre-existing test failures still present: TestDoctorCheckRegistries_WithConfig, TestGenproviders_* (not related to this feature)

context.notes: The implementation plan's 19 tasks are fully executed. The remaining work (syllago-6fubw) is genuinely new TUI feature work — the install wizard currently has no confirm-bucket rendering path, and the AnalysisResult type isn't referenced anywhere in the TUI package. This needs design work to determine UX surface, interaction model, and visual treatment. Also deferred: syllago-xjyng (ignore command, closed as out of scope). P3/P4 roadmap beads remain open (--dry-run, org-config docs, cap dynamic signals, converter manifest, user identity in audit, org-config staleness).
